WILDSHAPE.Dialog.Title: Wild Shape
WILDSHAPE.Onboarding.Title: Choose Known Forms
WILDSHAPE.Onboarding.Hint: Select the beast forms your druid knows.
WILDSHAPE.Transform.Title: Wild Shape
WILDSHAPE.Error.NoActor: Select a token or assign a character first.
WILDSHAPE.Error.NoResource: No "Wild Shape" resource found on character sheet. Add it to a resource slot.
WILDSHAPE.Error.NoCompendiums: No beast compendiums configured. Ask your GM to set them in Module Settings → GMAnt's Wild Shape.
WILDSHAPE.Error.BeastNotFound: Could not load the beast actor from the compendium.
WILDSHAPE.Error.MaxForms: You can only select up to {max} forms.
WILDSHAPE.Error.NoPermission: You don't have permission to view this creature's sheet. Ask your GM to adjust compendium permissions.
WILDSHAPE.Settings.ShowControlButtonHint: Display the Wild Shape paw icon in the token controls sidebar. Disable to hide the button (you can still open the dialog via macro).
WILDSHAPE.Settings.TempHpMultiplierHint: Temporary HP granted on Wild Shape = druid level × this number. RAW is 1.
WILDSHAPE.Settings.TempHpPersist: Temp HP Persist After Wild Shape
WILDSHAPE.Settings.TempHpPersistHint: When checked, temp HP gained by Wild Shape persist after reverting. When unchecked, temp HP gained by Wild Shape are removed when reverting.
WILDSHAPE.Settings.BeastCompendiumsHint: Comma-separated compendium IDs to scan for beasts (e.g. dnd5e.monsters, world.custom-beasts).
WILDSHAPE.Config.Title: Options
WILDSHAPE.Config.TempHpPersist: Temporary HP persist after Wild Shape ends
